var contacts = $input.all().map(function(i){return i.json;}).filter(function(c){return c.status !== 'deleted';});
return [{json:{contacts:contacts,count:contacts.length}}];

var body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{json:{email:body.email,name:body.name||body.email,company:body.company||''}}];

return [{json:{email:email,invite_sent:'yes',invite_sent_at:new Date().toISOString(),status:'sent'}}];
